title: Sonora Certified Farmer's Market
description: Skip the supermarket. Meet the local growers, artisans, and bakers of the Motherloade. The ultimate Saturday morning community tradition.

title: Magic of the Night
description: Downtown Sonora comes alive after dark. Antique cars, live street music, and late-night shopping right on Washington Street.

title: The Motherloade Fair
description: Carnival rides, local agriculture, live music, and deep-fried treats. The defining summer weekend for Tuolumne County families.
